title: Tokyo Charcoal Moulding
shortDescription: High-density charcoal louvers designed for striking interior accent walls.
longDescription: The Tokyo Charcoal Moulding series redefines interior spaces with its deep, rich textures. Engineered with high-density WPC, it offers the perfect blend of aesthetic elegance and structural durability, making it the top choice for modern architects.
installation: Features a seamless interlocking mechanism. Installed rapidly using standard structural PU adhesives and concealed brad nails directly onto levelled surfaces or framing.
maintenance: 100% washable surface. Simply wipe with a damp microfiber cloth. Do not use acid-based cleaners or abrasive scrubbers.

faqs.question: Can this be installed on damp walls?
faqs.answer: Yes, WPC is 100% waterproof, making it highly resistant to moisture. However, we recommend treating severe dampness or fungus before installation for maximum structural longevity.

faqs.question: Do these louvers require painting or polishing?
faqs.answer: No, our Tokyo series comes pre-finished with a premium foil layer and texture. It requires zero painting or polishing, saving you time and labor costs.

faqs.question: Is it suitable for exterior facades?
faqs.answer: The Tokyo series is designed specifically for interior use. For exteriors, please check our 'Exterior Louvers' category which comes with special UV-resistant coatings.

title: European Oak Laminate
shortDescription: AC4 grade commercial laminate flooring with authentic wood grain texture.
longDescription: Experience the warmth of real wood without the upkeep. Our European Oak Laminate is rated AC4, making it robust enough for heavy commercial foot traffic while maintaining a luxurious finish for residential spaces.
installation: Utilizes a glueless click-lock system for floating floor installation. Must be installed over a proper moisture barrier and acoustic underlayment on a flat subfloor.
maintenance: Sweep or vacuum regularly. For deeper cleaning, use a well-wrung damp mop with a laminate-approved cleaner. Avoid standing water or steam mops.

faqs.question: What does AC4 rating mean?
faqs.answer: AC4 is a commercial durability rating. It means the flooring has passed rigorous tests for abrasion, impact, and stain resistance, making it suitable for moderate commercial traffic and heavy residential use.

faqs.question: Can this be installed over existing tiles?
faqs.answer: Yes, as long as the existing tiles are firmly attached, level, and clean. You will need to use an appropriate foam underlayment to smooth out minor imperfections like grout lines.

faqs.question: Is laminate flooring pet-friendly?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. The high-density aluminum oxide wear layer is highly scratch-resistant, making it perfect for homes with dogs and cats. Just ensure any spills are wiped up promptly.

title: Lush Green Artificial Grass
shortDescription: High-density UV-treated synthetic turf for balconies and landscaping.
longDescription: Create an evergreen oasis with our premium artificial grass. Designed with 4-tone yarn for a natural look, it features excellent drainage and UV resistance, ensuring it stays vibrant all year round without water or mowing.
installation: Can be rolled out and secured with adhesive tape on hard surfaces (balconies) or installed with U-pins over a compacted, leveled crushed-stone base for landscaping.
maintenance: Rinse occasionally with water to remove dust. Remove debris with a leaf blower or stiff-bristled broom to keep the yarn standing upright.

faqs.question: Will rainwater pool on the grass?
faqs.answer: No, our premium grass features a perforated polyurethane backing designed for high water drainage, ensuring the surface dries quickly after rain.

faqs.question: Will the color fade in the harsh Indian summer?
faqs.answer: Our yarn is heavily UV-stabilized during the manufacturing process, preventing color fading and degradation even under direct, harsh sunlight.

faqs.question: Is it safe for pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is 100% non-toxic and pet-friendly. Solid waste can be easily picked up, and liquid waste washes away easily with a quick hose down.
